name: VAGRIENT
short_description: Play as an Armlys alien named Vagrient in this evolving sci-fi action/adventure game, featuring RPG elements. It's full of exploration, combat, character progression, puzzle solving and obstacle clearing!
detailed_description:
THE NEW EXPANSION HAS ARRIVED

Since the defeat of Cerbacore and restoration of the corrupted Warpgate, a place deep beneath the Ice Ruins has been exposed waiting to be explored. Take on the challenge of this new-found location and be rewarded!

The expansion features updated graphics, new content, quality of life improvements, adjustments and bug fixes.

SOLO DEVELOPED
DEBUT TITLE

VAGRIENT is a unique everlasting adventure with future expansion updates to come!
It provides a compelling, non-linear and open world experience.

THE FIRST CHAPTER: BRINK OF WAR

Play as Vagrient, an Armlys alien separated from his clan at war in another solar system. A corrupted Warpgate stands between, placing a halt to his return. Power must be restored to the gate. Defeating the 5 Titans across Zharnuu Prime will award Vagrient the special energy required to complete the objective!

Vagrient isn't alone though, he has his trusty companion "Sentinel" by his side to not only guide him through the journey but also to fight!

Key Features

  • Discover and use Warpgates to travel from one planet to another

  • Explore a vast solar system of planets containing what Vagrient desires

  • Engage in combat with other entities whilst managing energy output and consumption

  • Fight the unique Titan bosses, learn and strategize against there moves

  • Tackle any puzzles and obstacles that get in the way of the main objective

  • Learn new skills, allowing for different movement and combat techniques

  • Find old Armlys Relics, revitalise them and harness their powers

  • Use the interactive "Sentinel Link" tool provided by Sentinel

  • Extra content unlocked after game completion, utilising the Steam Leaderboards feature

  • Plus lots of other exciting content to uncover and experience

Skills Interface

View and manage your active skills in this simple, easy to use interface found within the Sentinel Link. Other interfaces are contained in the same area, including the Relic Vault which allows storage of found Relics!

New Player Expectations

As a new player, you will be given detailed tips whilst progressing through the early stages of the game to help you learn the core mechanics. Additionally, there is an in-game beginner's guide containing further details for you to refer to at any given time. The guide can be found in the pause menu.

Planet objectives are listed in Sentinel Link to assist you but be ready for a challenge though... timing your attacks and movement is key in combat. Observe closely as you attempt to overcome the many obstacles, for each step forward brings growth.

The Abyss - [unlocked after first chapter completion]

Compete against other players on the Steam Leaderboard to become #1 by doing Abyss runs. The player must defeat as many Omens as they can in a single timed run and survive. Use your acquired skills and items to create the optimal build!

Abyssal Totems can spawn that have different effects when collected.

Abyssal Totem - Overtime

Increases remaining run time, allowing the player to stay longer.

Abyssal Totem - Annihilation

Instant defeat of all Omens on the screen, this can really boost the current score.

Abyssal Totem - Energize

Replenishes all energy to max, can be a life saver when energies are drained.

After Completing the First Chapter / Base Game

  • The Abyss location is unlocked which is a unique Wormhole entrance. You will be notified about the location of the Wormhole upon finishing the First Chapter.

  • Sigil Items are unlocked and are powerful relic variants, featuring different mechanics! Each Sigil has a set spawn location and you must find them in order to be able to unleash the devastating power that they hold.

  • Continue to explore the universe, take part in expansion and optional content!

NOTE:

Recommended display resolution is 1080p. If the user's monitor has a different native resolution and are experiencing display issues, change the resolution to 1920x1080.
